MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Sat, 01 Jun 2024 04:08:03 -0700
Subject: Trump and his allies braced for a guilty verdict. Then the bombshell arrived
Message-ID: <665b0117.050a0220.80966.3cd3SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADVNQBWWAW4M7VFUL6B5GNYUV4PMEI4J2D5VATTW3YXA63JKBULYYKZB5O6VCYPEBOHRKZBRPCUXXPBLWWW4NA5WVGO33ZS6PJVHVGKF2EJUFSCFISPHI2ODFOCE3UIU4TZCEMXW7WUHHV5DHF25JYJNH5FLHIRXMCB6LWSSHY4TMUKZSLIZN&d=AIAACFZ6EVIDB2PV5POYYTZXCW7A3GNFBSVPQCD6TMK43YWDZZU4JDLNPBRLXYMXEG7ZWNBKKQAMQT7VF4HDVBOO7UA6CNLOJ2DSXOADHOEFMA5I7DYALGKEE5ARBHWPH2CUUH5CQXYGFQLU3GAEDU3YDGIL67FFOESC6XVB6DUBDVC7ISUCGAPYZGIZIQF7GFRG6VGDXAWABZ5ED4&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACOKCY3LBLNIHJ5F2XPMZELNIHG2GLZ6DLC3XHCSIVWRILIRXGURMGG3UG32OKDZA2JCJW2X3MOR7CHTTINJBLNSRLFD4CNKR3SH4ZF3YMZSZ2MREQIW67MOZBLII5QMCHQZRS4H5N73INR5WTYLGUOAFRDSSLPJHCT4Q2JWGIBY4TEKDDJ4Q&d=AIAACZNUBYOT5ICWWEDUZHHVG2J2YNL6YXPUSJZNVVQIQM2EVXHFPEA7RD2DRGMWAFWW6DFXBPN5AUFMOYOHRE5NNVP6L6O7SHCHAH7CPOKK5Q2BXBHDE4HDM6GXO54YH2RGN4EIAOQJ2FMAEKH5O6HNQKSMNGW56VM7OOY7FHRUIVR2PIWJKFBT&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADQQUXZU7B654UUSHOPQQHFXM3JLV5YCJQLHC6A2HRSVYNWACWPYVPKMGWC33WOHZMVEIQPUZRIORMBMSQTM4REV4CUSKMI2JOJLWYQSQHW6QPWDCYYD4E6FL2Z6QR6LJXF5J53UMVKN76OEIXVTI5WN7C5LNMVIEIVRRHPFWMTWVRYSKTURS&d=AIAACHJMPF6L2WIRXFRIFY6BVIP3S7KJHM2RIVDAUMVPASG7WLNZ2N4L2DDP2PI2L3XISRJPN2FQJXHLVWIY4V3JRTIK7XCRYEVEYWTI733B5PZCHCAFD76KT2ZHAG7OCTFDQVBLZV6WAEIT42JDZ4NKEJIT7K74CRPKQYAWX3HIY7BCOYDPIZ4P&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
        <!-- @Subject: Trump and his allies braced for a guilty verdict. Then the bombshell arrived -->
           <tr><td><table style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1)" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACWEGMEO3VW6O4GIL26G3WFOGEQJDFOWU725RGT32FVKGMK3ALPQLXC6X3F2TCDY6X2MYQEJFIIMDG5OZ7YDF7V2IIBNQEJIVRKJSDWOWYDKOSL5ATG7BBCQL4KNFEKAJMMM2L7S6GSX67G7JTVAMOCDXJIO65VSUDOJ6AMROBOTLL3JH6H44&" id="LrgCardImage1|BB1nqNMX" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><img height="350" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.fa3a7829ad7fdc69fa87908f8103bff9&pid=Wdp&w=600&h=350&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="600"></a></td></tr><tr><td style="padding:20px 20px 8px 20px;font-size:28px;line-height:1.2;color:#333;font-weight:400;text-decoration:none"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACIP3SEQ5QADEVI5K3OJAOV5KQIGDB2BR2F2TFR2RL4RKAWJLYNHXS7M2SRB4O5BZ2S7OFBXRL2NZL3BC3CFD6HWMOWTFG4IQAMKYRJD3L3CC4VTPXO3FFONSGNDOGSLIQFR2MIED5FL3V77VPNODFT4JVFQMYKMYYY2VLNCVBGJXVZGDKXEP&" id="LrgCardTitle1|BB1nqNMX" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">Trump and his allies braced for a guilty verdict. Then the bombshell arrived</a></td></tr><tr><td style="padding:0 20px 11px 20px;font-size:18px;color:#333;text-decoration:none;line-height:1.3"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACJDSAOFUZOQODGMXQPRRNNPWXFCZH6ABWF6K2YRCROPK4U7QBFW7KJZJ67UEAQPYTFD3THIBPDIKJB6TQ4DRRWPGL7DYENOBSQ4HCOX7XKIHOYAOAC33AADC4ZE3ZC34EXGGUXC2V447QDFVUWYZW2KWCV2LYOJHJODU4KLXQNYGIPA6MJ65FEWEXDYMOSE25K62KPUJ64NVWM&" id="LrgCardSummary1|BB1nqNMX" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">The next time former president Donald Trump holds a campaign rally will be his first as a convicted felon.</a></td></tr><tr><td height="25"><table style="margin:0 20px 15px 37px"><tr><td style="padding-right:12px;padding-top:5px" height="28"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADTSVU3W4NQ24TRSQFEFYKTZRB3XDDLQ3RCAK4BBEY3BPGIJF5QBQO2RRSLUATV4DO5NAGY4RBRKSFXHSZGFE3C2GHGIVHPHGEGT5SWGN3GGNQOUW5PMKE3PA5TVEUFKBEX334LVN53WEJ7R3AJHVYEJI2G6AQVIEIJFJZUOCXADC3IPXYMEF2RQZ7C722XEPFUABF3XMRPZDBU&" id="LrgCardProviderLogo1|BB1nqNMX" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><img height="28" src="https://img-s-msn-com.akamaized.net/tenant/amp/entityid/AAywGC0.img?w=28&h=28&m=6&q=60&u=t&o=t&l=f&f=jpg" style="border:none" alt=""></a></td><td style="font-size:18px;text-decoration:none;line-height:1.2;border:none;color:#666" height="28"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADK5ZNGIBWQYP3B2YESZCOJP3A5PLCYPNYYRWIQLT2VAJV46BNEWGS67KA2VVN4ACGEEUVYLNITGPXMFWCSTBTYDSSBJ2KVRQU4GHGFHRQY2RFZ67YFWWF3DLMWH6XM4JJHMP35YYJSLKO63Q5ZQXOWKTHNNVMAQFO4TB5Y4YXKMNFDDW646YAKUAXDHLFCHWDO5JV36ZALED4Y&" id="LrgCardProviderNamePos1|BB1nqNMX" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">CNN</a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td></tr>
